name: XMAX V3 PRO Glass Mouthpiece
summary: XMAX V3 PRO Glass Mouthpiece — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Upgrade your customers’ vaping experience with the XMax V3 Pro Glass Mouthpiece —a premium accessory engineered for enhanced flavour, smoother airflow, and improved vapour cooling. Designed as a direct replacement for the standard plastic unit, this high-quality glass mouthpiece elevates the performance of the XMax V3 Pro Vaporiser. Crafted from high-quality glass, this mouthpiece delivers a cleaner, more authentic taste by eliminating the flavour interference often associated with plastic components. Ideal for users who value terpene-rich, full-spectrum vapour. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
